# Fixtures

Parent: [Gnosis](../README.md)

Open-source package support files for the Fixtures module.

## Key Files

- `arena-merge-gate.valid.json`: Source file in this module.
- `ecology-graph-snapshot.valid.json`: Source file in this module.
- `study-graph-snapshot.exploratory.valid.json`: Source file in this module.
- `study-graph-snapshot.valid.json`: Source file in this module.
- `study-publish-gate.blocked.json`: Source file in this module.
- `verification-bundle.valid.json`: Source file in this module.

## Usage

Use this README as the local map for this directory. Keep implementation details near the owning source files, and update this document when the directory contract changes.

## Verification

Run the closest package or app-level check through the repository-owned `a0` or `monster` target after changing behavior in this directory.
